title: Law’s Plan Advances
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Luffy. The central beat is law’s plan advances.
scene: The scene focuses on law’s plan advances, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Luffy shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You will lose your most important subordinate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and Straw Hat-ya is taking care of Caesar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In short, you'll also be losing S.A.D.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But you won't be laughing for long

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's been two years since the war...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All whitebeard did was end the era.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That war was just the prologue.

summary: Law’s Plan Advances. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
